description: Product description XOC purple whitening toothpaste is specially formulated to help optically correct yellow tones on the teeth. From the first brush, the purple polishing formula gets to work to help reduce common stains caused by tea, coffee, red wine, etc for a brighter, whiter smile. Containing sodium fluoride and a minty flavour, it also helps to fight plaque and strengthen teeth whilst leave your mouth feeling clean and fresh. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to the toothbrush, brush teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, rinse thoroughly, and do not swallow toothpaste. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
